$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling.
$schema.markdownDescription: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling.

version.description: ZeroPress Build Pages config format version.
version.markdownDescription: ZeroPress Build Pages config format version.

site.description: User-facing site metadata used by Build Pages.
site.markdownDescription: User-facing site metadata used by Build Pages.

url.description: Canonical site URL. Use an empty string or omit this field for local builds without canonical output.
url.markdownDescription: Canonical site URL. Use an empty string or omit this field for local builds without canonical output.

locale.description: Site locale used for generated preview-data language metadata, such as html lang and feed language.
locale.markdownDescription: Site locale used for generated preview-data language metadata, such as HTML `lang` and feed language.

expose_generator.description: Whether generated HTML should expose the ZeroPress generator meta tag. Set false for white-label sites.
expose_generator.markdownDescription: Whether generated HTML should expose `<meta name="generator" content="ZeroPress">`. Set `false` for white-label sites.

search.description: Whether native ZeroPress search should be enabled when the selected theme supports search UI. Set false to omit native search artifacts and hide theme search UI.
search.markdownDescription: Whether native ZeroPress search should be enabled when the selected theme supports search UI. Set `false` to omit native search artifacts and hide theme search UI.

indexing.description: Fallback robots.txt indexing policy. Missing or true allows indexing; false writes a fallback robots.txt that disallows all agents unless the source directory provides robots.txt.
indexing.markdownDescription: Fallback `robots.txt` indexing policy. Missing or `true` allows indexing; `false` writes a fallback `robots.txt` that disallows all agents unless the source directory provides `robots.txt`.

siteLogo.description: Optional site logo data copied into generated preview-data.
siteLogo.markdownDescription: Optional site logo data copied into generated preview-data.

src.description: Logo URL or safe relative path.
src.markdownDescription: Logo URL or safe relative path.

alt.description: Optional logo alternative text. Themes may fall back to site.title when omitted.
alt.markdownDescription: Optional logo alternative text. Themes may fall back to `site.title` when omitted.

siteFooter.description: Optional footer display data copied into generated preview-data.
siteFooter.markdownDescription: Optional footer display data copied into generated preview-data.

copyright_text.description: Footer copyright or legal text. ZeroPress does not add a copyright symbol automatically.
copyright_text.markdownDescription: Footer copyright or legal text. ZeroPress does not add a copyright symbol automatically.

attribution.description: When false, bundled themes hide the Published with ZeroPress attribution. Missing or true means attribution may be shown.
attribution.markdownDescription: When `false`, bundled themes hide the Published with ZeroPress attribution. Missing or `true` means attribution may be shown.

last_updated.description: Optional page meta enrichment. none does not generate last_updated values; git reads the latest commit date for each Markdown file.
last_updated.markdownDescription: Optional page meta enrichment. `none` does not generate `last_updated` values; `git` reads the latest commit date for each Markdown file.

frontPage.description: Source file or theme template used for the site root.
frontPage.markdownDescription: Source file or theme template used for the site root.

type.description: Front page source mode. theme_index uses theme/index.html. markdown and html read a source file.
type.markdownDescription: Front page source mode. `theme_index` uses `theme/index.html`. `markdown` and `html` read a source file.

file.description: Optional source-root relative file path. Defaults to index.md for markdown and .zeropress/index.html for html.
file.markdownDescription: Optional source-root relative file path. Defaults to `index.md` for `markdown` and `.zeropress/index.html` for `html`.

layout.description: Only applies to html front pages. true renders the file as page body content through the ZeroPress layout; false treats it as a full standalone HTML document.
layout.markdownDescription: Only applies to `html` front pages. `true` renders the file as page body content through the ZeroPress layout; `false` treats it as a full standalone HTML document.

sourceFilePath.description: Source-root relative path. Leading slash, parent-directory traversal, query strings, and hash fragments are not allowed.
sourceFilePath.markdownDescription: Source-root relative path. Leading slash, parent-directory traversal, query strings, and hash fragments are not allowed.

customHtml.description: Trusted HTML snippets copied into preview-data custom_html slots.
customHtml.markdownDescription: Trusted HTML snippets copied into preview-data `custom_html` slots.

head_end.description: HTML file injected before </head> by ZeroPress build.
head_end.markdownDescription: HTML file injected before `</head>` by ZeroPress build.

body_end.description: HTML file injected before </body> by ZeroPress build.
body_end.markdownDescription: HTML file injected before `</body>` by ZeroPress build.

menus.description: Menu definitions copied into generated preview-data.
menus.markdownDescription: Menu definitions copied into generated preview-data.

menuItem.description: Menu item copied into generated preview-data.
menuItem.markdownDescription: Menu item copied into generated preview-data.

type.description: Optional legacy origin metadata accepted for compatibility. Build Pages ignores this value and does not copy it to resolved config or preview-data. Planned for removal in v0.7.
type.markdownDescription: Optional legacy origin metadata accepted for compatibility. Build Pages ignores this value and does not copy it to resolved config or preview-data. Planned for removal in `v0.7`.

collections.description: Reading-order collections generated from Markdown source paths.
collections.markdownDescription: Reading-order collections generated from Markdown source paths.
